GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [nation@0 ASC NULLS LAST, o_year@1 DESC]
  GpuSortExec: expr=[nation@0 ASC NULLS LAST, o_year@1 DESC]
    GpuProjectExec: expr=[nation@0 as nation, o_year@1 as o_year, sum(profit.amount)@2 as sum_profit]
      GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[nation, o_year], aggr=[sum(profit.amount)]
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=10324440
          GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([nation@0, o_year@1], 8), input_partitions=8
            GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[nation, o_year], aggr=[sum(profit.amount)]
              GpuProjectExec: expr=[n_name@0 as nation, date_part(YEAR, o_orderdate@5) as o_year, l_extendedprice@2 * (Some(1),20,0 - l_discount@3) - ps_supplycost@4 * l_quantity@1 as amount]
                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=10324440
                  GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(n_nationkey@0, s_nationkey@3)], projection=[1, 2, 3, 4, 6, 7]
                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=10324440
                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([n_nationkey@0], 8), input_partitions=1
                        GpuScanExec: batch_size=10324440
                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=10324440
                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([s_nationkey@3], 8), input_partitions=8
                        GpuProjectExec: expr=[l_quantity@1 as l_quantity, l_extendedprice@2 as l_extendedprice, l_discount@3 as l_discount, s_nationkey@4 as s_nationkey, ps_supplycost@5 as ps_supplycost, o_orderdate@0 as o_orderdate]
                          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=10324440
                            GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(o_orderkey@0, l_orderkey@0)], projection=[1, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7]
                              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=10324440
                                GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([o_orderkey@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                                  GpuScanExec: batch_size=10324440

                                          GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([ps_suppkey@1, ps_partkey@0], 8), input_partitions=8

                                                GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(s_suppkey@0, l_suppkey@2)], projection=[1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7]

--- memory ---
